text:
There once was a tiny mouse named Benny who lived in a giant sunflower field. Benny loved exploring every nook and cranny of his favorite place. One day, he stumbled upon a tiny sapling that seemed to glow. It became Benny’s favorite tree.

Every night after snuggling into his cozy burrow beside the tree’s leafy branches, he would whisper goodnight fantasies about soaring like birds atop that star.

One autumn evening, a storm blew through the farm. Lightning danced through clouds, rattling antique lamps. Benny listened anxiously as the winds shook the field.

Suddenly, something glinted from among the raindrops. It was something small! Benny peered closer. There sat an old owl perched on the glowing sapling, eyes twinkling.

The wise owl looked at Benny through fluffy feathers. “Would you like to fly?”

Benny laughed. “Oh! Yes!”

The owl just nodded. It swooped down with a grace that made stars seem dull.
